ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Agazzarri`s dates and nationality see the entry by Adelmo Damerini in DBI. See also the entry on Wikipedia. He was Chapel master. He joined the Intronati when he returned to Siena in 1606, after some years in Rome where he was Praefectus musicae at Collegio Romano.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
